name: codex-gamebook-engine
description: CLI emulator and tooling for playing Gamebook Format (GBF) JSON game files

comments.fengari_pin_rationale: Lua 5.3 runtime (fengari). Pinned to a specific version rather than a floating ^0.1.5 because upstream Fengari does not actively cut releases — the npm 0.1.5 build has been stable for years and we've validated all our combat round scripts and section script events against it. If upstream ever ships a newer release that we want to adopt, bump this pin deliberately and re-run the full regression harness (lw_probe, warlock_probe, lw_run1..4, warlock_run1..3, wwy_run1..2) to verify nothing regressed. See gamebook_codex_v2.md section 'Codex Version and Compatibility' for the browser-side pin (fengari-web.js is committed as a static file rather than installed via npm, so its version is tracked by the file's FENGARI_VERSION constant 'Fengari 0.1.4').
comments.why_not_wasmoon: wasmoon (Lua 5.4 via WASM) is a stronger maintained alternative. We evaluated it and decided the port cost is not justified right now — all existing Lua scripts are simple enough that Fengari 0.1.5 runs them correctly and no maintenance bugs have surfaced in practice. Tracked as a back-burner option.
